summary.en: A leading AI model provider with multimodal capabilities, including text, speech, music and intelligent agent tools.
summary.zh: 领先的AI模型提供商，具备文本、语音、音乐和智能体工具等多模态能力。

title.en: MiniMax AI API Key - Multimodal AI Models | Get Model Key
title.zh: MiniMax AI API Key - 多模态AI模型 | Get Model Key

description.en: Get MiniMax AI API key for access to their full suite of multimodal AI models including text, speech, music and agent tools.
description.zh: 获取MiniMax AI API Key，访问其全系列多模态AI模型，包括文本、语音、音乐和智能体工具。

benefit.en: New users can generally claim about CNY 15 in trial credit, often with real-name verification required (subject to official policy).
benefit.zh: 新用户一般可领取约 15 元试用额度，通常需实名（具体以官方规则为准）。

notes.en: Its concise output style helps control token cost and works well for lightweight daily tasks plus multi-step command chaining in OpenClaw.
notes.zh: 输出风格精炼、Token 开销可控，适合 OpenClaw 的日常轻任务与多轮指令串联。
